An interactive test that measures your readiness for AI in your professional life

Completely free — No signup — Instant results

How much time do you have?

⚡ Quick 5 minutes Quick overview questions
📝 Short 10 minutes Broader coverage in reasonable time
⭐ Standard 15 minutes Best balance between thoroughness and time Recommended
🔍 Detailed 20 minutes Deeper assessment with analytical questions
🎯 Comprehensive 30 minutes Most comprehensive for the most accurate result

📖 How to Use

Choose a duration that suits you, then answer the general questions. After that, select your specialty for tailored questions. You'll get an instant report with your score and recommendations.
